name: Breakfast Fruit Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 1/2 cups oats, flour, sugar, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, mix orange juice, vegetable oil, egg, and vanilla until well combined.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until fully incorporated.
4. Stir in the diced dried mixed fruit.
5. Pour the batter into a 13x9 inch pan sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
6. Sprinkle remaining oats evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20-22 minutes or until lightly browned and edges pull away from the sides of the pan.
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
9. Store tightly covered, or freeze in individual bags and thaw at room temperature or microwave on high for 30 seconds per bar. Makes 20 bars.
